heading: Prerequisites
body:
To complete this tutorial, you must have the following:

- An `M20` or higher cluster with 2 or more search nodes
  using **High-CPU** `S20` or higher search tier.

- An environment to run interactive Python notebooks such as [VS Code](https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/datascience/jupyter-notebooks)
  or [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com).
